tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $94.53 (OilPrice.com Jun 2, +2.7% from Friday; -19% in May worst since 2020; up 4%+ Monday on talks suspension). Jun 1-2: Iran suspended peace talks; US hit Iranian radar/drone installations; Iran targeted US base in Kuwait. Stress (50%) + Tail (35%) = 85% continued disruption pricing. Conviction raised to medium on talks suspension + military exchange. Stop-loss: Brent sub-$85 on confirmed talks resumption + de-escalation. Talks suspension removes near-term de-escalation pathway.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $94.53 (Jun 2, +2.7%); ASEAN Energy ~128.0 est. (+2.4%); ASEAN Banks ~190.0 est. (-2.1%); iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (+16bp on talks suspension). Jun 1-2: Iran suspends peace talks; US-Iran exchange fire. Tail 35% (up from 27%). If deal collapses: energy equities rebound from oversold, banks sell off. Energy/bank divergence trade strengthened by talks suspension. Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Increase Exposure on Talks Suspension
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~57.20 est. (+0.7% on risk-off from talks suspension). Jun 1-2: Iran suspends peace talks; US hits Iranian radar; Iran targets Kuwait base. Tail 35% (up from 27%) justifies increased USD Call/PHP Put overlay. Talks suspension removes near-term deal hope — PHP vulnerable to oil spike + risk-off. Nuclear sequencing + Strait sovereignty + $12B frozen assets impasse widen on talks suspension. Stop-loss: confirmed talks resume + mine clearance (below 56.00). Conviction raised to medium.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Increase Exposure on Talks Suspension
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,600 est. (+0.6% on talks suspension). Brent $94.53 (Jun 2, +2.7%) — ICP overshoot ~$25/bbl vs $70 budget. Jun 1-2: Iran suspends peace talks; US-Iran exchange escalates. Tail 35%: collapse drives IDR sharply weaker on Brent spike. Talks suspension removes near-term IDR recovery catalyst. Stop-loss: USD/IDR 16,400 (confirmed talks resume + P&I). Conviction raised to medium.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold; Widen at 185bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (+16bp Jun 1-2 on talks suspension); ASEAN HY ~555bp (+27bp). Iran suspends peace talks (Jun 1) — credit optimism reversed. Tail 35% (up from 27%): deal collapse drives iTraxx 230-260bp. Stress (50%): stabilises 165-200bp — well above prior 160bp. Tal suspension removes near-term tightening catalyst. Hold protection; remove at confirmed talks resumption + mine clearance. Conviction raised to high on talks suspension.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Physical Supply Lag
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $18.81 est. (Platts May 22 carried); TTF €44.50 est. (carried). Iran suspends peace talks (Jun 1) — deal timeline extension supports structural JKM-TTF premium. Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of deal outcome. Stress target $16-20 JKM; tail $24-28. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + Ras Laffan restart timeline. Conviction medium maintained.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (+16bp Jun 1-2 on talks suspension). Iran suspended peace talks (Jun 1) — deal window narrowing sharply. Execute any residual private placements now before talks suspension becomes full collapse. Tail 35%: collapse targets 230-260bp.

Brent $94.53 (Jun 2, +2.7% on talks suspension); THB ~32.80 est. (+0.8% on risk-off); Thailand 10Y ~2.18% est. (+10bp); tail 35% (up from 27% on talks suspension + military exchange). Brent moderating trend reversed — PTTEP EBITDA benefits sustained. Execute USD H2 prefunding immediately. Window narrowing sharply: if talks resume spreads may tighten, if collapse (tail 35%), spreads spike uncontrollably.

iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (+16bp on talks suspension); USD/SGD ~1.2640 (+0.2% risk-off); Brent $94.53 (Jun 2, +2.7%). Iran suspended peace talks (Jun 1) — deal window reversing. Execute revolving-credit extension now: tail (35%) collapse scenario targets 230bp+; talk suspension removes tightening catalyst. Full USD hedging: SGD weakening on risk-off reduces hedge cost.

ASEAN HY ~555bp (+27bp on talks suspension); Brent $94.53 (Jun 2, +2.7%). Iran suspends peace talks — deal optimism reversed. Window for Hyflux restructuring narrowing fast. Desalination power cost elevated on Brent $94.53. Talks suspension reopens tail risk. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms immediately before talks suspension becomes full collapse. Tail (35%): collapse pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
